narrative:
Cols 65-A (precinct in Franklin County) has 754 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 21.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.4%, a modest Democratic lean of 3.2 percentage points.
